name: My work lung claim got denied, what now?

mainEntity.name: My work lung claim got denied, what now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal in 20-30 days with better medical proof and witnesses[4].
acceptedAnswer.description: Appeal within 20-30 days depending on state by requesting a hearing; gather stronger medical evidence like a second opinion linking exposure. Denials often cite insufficient work nexus, but reversals happen with better proof[4]. Utah allows formal hearings. - Challenge insurer's doctor with your QME. - Add new evidence: coworker affidavits, SDS. File appeal fast, get legal help for 50%+ win rates on good cases.

description: Appeal in 20-30 days with better medical proof and witnesses[4].
